studies.title: Multi-center retrospective and prospective data analysis with additive app-based therapy to optimize amblyopia therapy

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of 'Caterna-Sehschulung' as an intervention for amblyopia therapy, which matches the product name and description provided. The study aims to optimize amblyopia therapy using this specific digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study involves a multi-center retrospective and prospective data analysis, which indicates an observational design using real-world data to evaluate the effectiveness of an app-based therapy for amblyopia. There is no mention of randomization or controlled trial conditions, which aligns with RWE classification.
